incorrect_action_type_used: Agent used an update/patch action when a different action was required.
false_positive_procedure_search: Agent incorrectly identified a procedure as being within the required timeframe.
false_negative_procedure_search: Agent failed to find existing procedure records despite them being present.
incorrect_calculation_logic: Agent performed the calculation correctly but applied it to the wrong time window.
redundant_order_creation_failure: Agent failed to consolidate or manage existing orders, leading to redundant actions.
unnecessary_duplicate_order_creation: Agent created a new order despite an existing order already meeting the clinical requirement.
false_negative_observation_search: Agent failed to find existing observation records despite them being present.
false_negative_medication_search: Agent failed to find existing medication records despite them being present.
insufficient_data_handling_error: Agent incorrectly concluded data was insufficient when records were available.
pagination_loop_failure: Agent entered an infinite or redundant loop while attempting to navigate paginated FHIR search results.
incorrect_clinical_protocol_interpretati: Agent correctly retrieved data but failed to follow the specific clinical logic provided in the instructions.
false_negative_immunization_search: Agent failed to find existing immunization records despite them being present.
incorrect_date_logic_calculation: Agent performed incorrect arithmetic or comparison when evaluating date thresholds for clinical protocols.
